LanguageData.SC_SettingsBaseCap: Base stockpile cap per settlement per resource: {0}
LanguageData.SC_SettingsRouteDecay: Route efficiency decay per travel day: {0}\nFormula: efficiency = 1 / (1 + days × decay)\nExample: 5-day route → 1 / (1 + 5 × {0}) = {1}%
LanguageData.SC_SettingsLocalCap: Local stockpile cap per resource (Complex mode): {0}
LanguageData.SC_SellOrdersTooltip:
Sell orders automatically convert stockpiled resources into silver each tax period.

Resources are drawn from the stockpile up to the specified amount. If the stockpile doesn't have enough, only what's available is sold.

Silver received = units sold × base silver rate × {0} penalty rate.

Overflow (resources exceeding the stockpile cap) is also sold at this rate.
LanguageData.SC_OverflowInfo: Overflow and sell orders convert at {0} of base silver rate ({1} silver per unit). Silver is distributed across settlements.
LanguageData.SC_SameSettlementError: Source and destination cannot be the same settlement.
LanguageData.SC_CapContribution: This settlement contributes {0} cap per resource to the faction stockpile.
LanguageData.SC_NoRoutes: No supply routes. Manage routes from the faction Supply Chain tab.
LanguageData.SC_TitheInjectionTooltip:
Tithe injection converts stockpiled resources into additional tithe budget.

Configured amounts are drawn from the stockpile each tax period. The budget raises the tithe cap for that resource, letting you choose what items to receive via the tithe menu.

If the stockpile doesn't have enough, only what's available is injected.
LanguageData.SC_TitheInjectionPerSettlement: Configure tithe injections per settlement in the settlement Supply Chain tab.
LanguageData.SC_ShowSettlementRoutesDesc: Toggle display of supply route lines for this settlement on the world map.
LanguageData.SC_ShowAllRoutesDesc: Toggle display of all supply route lines across the empire on the world map.
LanguageData.SC_ShowRouteLabelsDesc: Toggle display of resource type and amount labels on visible supply route lines.
LanguageData.SC_Stat_SellRateMultiplier: Multiplier applied to sell order silver rates. Higher values mean more silver per unit sold.
LanguageData.SC_Stat_RouteEfficiencyBonus: Bonus added to supply route efficiency for routes originating from this settlement. Reduces losses in transit.
